content: {"cards": [{"name": "Steadfast Sentinel", "mana_cost": "{2}{W}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Human Soldier", "oracle_text": "", "flavor_text": "\"I stand watch so others may rest.\"", "power": "2", "toughness": "4", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Vanilla creature testing restraint. 2/4 for 3 mana is slightly below the power curve but acceptable for common white. The defensive stats fit white's protective nature and provide good blocking utility in limited formats."}, {"name": "Dawnlight Pegasus", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Creature \u2014 Pegasus", "oracle_text": "Flying", "flavor_text": "It carries the first light of dawn on its wings, bringing hope to those below.", "power": "1", "toughness": "2", "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Simple keyword-only creature. Flying is evergreen and fits perfectly in white. 1/2 flying for 2 mana is appropriately costed for common - not overpowered but playable in limited. Pegasus is a classic white creature type."}, {"name": "Righteous Banishment", "mana_cost": "{1}{W}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["W"], "color_identity": ["W"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Exile target attacking or blocking creature.", "flavor_text": "\"Your aggression ends here.\" \u2014Lyra, Temple Guardian", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "White's primary removal at uncommon. Exiling fits white's color pie perfectly. The restriction to attacking/blocking creatures makes it conditional but still powerful - it can save you from combat damage or remove a key blocker. Costed fairly at 2 mana for uncommon."}, {"name": "Scholarly Insight", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Draw a card, then scry 1.", "flavor_text": "Knowledge reveals not just what is, but what could be.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common", "design_notes": "Classic blue cantrip with minor upside. Draw a card replaces itself, and scry 1 provides small card selection. This is appropriately costed at 2 mana for common - compare to Opt which is 1 mana for scry 1 then draw. The extra mana gives the extra scry timing flexibility."}, {"name": "Arcane Disruption", "mana_cost": "{1}{U}", "cmc": 2, "colors": ["U"], "color_identity": ["U"], "type_line": "Instant", "oracle_text": "Counter target spell unless its controller pays {2}.", "flavor_text": "\"Magic flows like water\u2014redirect it, and watch your enemies' plans crumble.\"", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon", "design_notes": "Soft counterspell variant testing stack interaction. The 'unless its controller pays {2}' creates interesting decisions - early game it's often a hard counter, late game it's a tax. Properly costed at 2 mana for uncommon, following the template of cards like Mana Leak."}]}
